metadata.source_title: Guitare blues 'dans le style' GIBSON L0
metadata.scale: FULL SIZE — all measurements in inches per drawing note
metadata.notes: 19-fret ladder-braced small-body blues guitar. Fret interval table from drawing. Body dimensions from drawing annotations. Materials explicitly listed on drawing.

name: Gibson L0
description: Small-body blues guitar in the Gibson L0 style. Ladder-braced mahogany construction with spruce bracing. Classic pre-war small-body acoustic. Famous as Robert Johnson's guitar (L1 variant). The L0 is slightly smaller than the L1 with similar construction. Between Martin 0 and 00 in body size.
cam_notes: Pending body generator. Ladder bracing differs from X-brace acoustic generator.

scale.fret_positions_source: Drawing fret table — values are interval widths, not cumulative

body.body_size_comparison: Between Martin 0 and 00. Smaller than 00 (352mm), smaller than L1.

soundhole.source: Drawing annotations '3rd dia' and '4th dia' with White/Black/White wood ring label

body.bracing_description: Ladder braced top and back. Pre-war Gibson construction. All braces stop short of linings. Crossing brace below bridge. Center reinforcing strip on back.

body_section_widths_inches.note: Width sections shown in bottom cross-section view

back_plate.source: MATERIEL listing — Back, sides, top, neck, lining, end/neck, block: Mahogany

sides.lining_source: Lining Top & Bottom Mahogany — drawing label

neck.nut_width_source: Neck width at nut 1 13/16 — drawing annotation
neck.truss_rod_notes: Not trussed or stiffener — drawing annotation. No truss rod. 13/16 at 8th fret.
neck.joint_notes: Standard pre-war Gibson dovetail neck joint

bridge.material_note: Bridge 2 pieces: BRZLN, Rossenwood — drawing (Brazilian Rosewood likely)

variants.name: Blues Style
variants.description: Full-size plan in the Gibson L0 style. Ladder braced, all-mahogany construction except spruce bracing. Pre-war small-body blues guitar.
pending: Body outline tracing in Fusion 360 for CAM
Body depth measurement (not annotated on available sheet)
